description.p: ClamUI is a modern Linux desktop application that provides a user-friendly graphical interface for the ClamAV antivirus command-line tool. Built with GTK4 and libadwaita for a native GNOME appearance.

ul.li: Select files or directories to scan using the native file dialog
Background scanning keeps the UI responsive during long scans
Clear, readable display of scan results
Graceful handling when ClamAV is not installed
Modern Adwaita styling with proper GNOME integration

description.p: Portmaster privacy-filter audit, quarantine restore hardening, and scanner reliability fixes

ul.li: Add an optional Portmaster privacy-filter check to the security audit that reports running, installed, or not-installed status and per-module health without affecting summary counts when Portmaster is absent
Harden quarantine restore handling against unsafe path and metadata manipulation (GHSA-xhhj-qvvr-vhwq)
Fix full scans hanging mid-run by draining ClamAV stderr concurrently with stdout so the scanner no longer deadlocks on a full pipe buffer
Improve system-tray compatibility under Flatpak and stricter StatusNotifierItem hosts (Plasma 6, Ayatana, xapp-sn-watcher) with ARGB icon fallbacks and attention-icon handling
Document installation via AppMan / AM in the install guide
Refresh Python and Flatpak runtime dependencies, including cryptography, urllib3, certifi, packaging, and PyGObject

description.p: Security hardening, Flatpak host-ClamAV fixes, tray reliability, and Spanish translation support

ul.li: Harden privileged ClamAV config saving with UID-checked staging, source validation, destination allowlisting, and atomic installs
Prevent scan path arguments from being interpreted as ClamAV command-line flags
Mask quarantine restore permissions to regular mode bits, reject symlink restore destinations, and avoid restoring setuid, setgid, or sticky bits
Protect scheduled-scan crontab updates from deleting unrelated user entries
Require host ClamAV tools for Flatpak and improve host config, detection, updater, and audit behavior from the sandbox
Fix Flatpak daemon file-list scans with host-visible paths
Refresh Python dependency locks and Flatpak runtime pins including cryptography, packaging, and more-itertools

Fix updater gettext error handling, scanner EOF CPU spinning, tray profile updates, tray crash recovery, removable-device scan requeues, EICAR temp cleanup, statistics timestamp parsing, and VirusTotal UTC timestamps
Add Spanish translation support
Add draft GitHub release workflow and refresh CI/action dependencies

description.p: System security audit, Flatpak hardening, AppImage delta updates, and tray reliability

ul.li: Add system security audit dashboard with firewall, MAC, SSH, rootkit, and ClamAV health checks
Notify when the security audit finds issues and add info links for each check
Add AppImage delta update support via zsync
Add French and Italian translations and refresh German and Chinese (zh_CN) strings
Add an in-app language override so users can pick the interface language regardless of system locale
Address OWASP audit findings across scanner, updater, and logging paths
Improve scan detail UX and GUI shutdown behavior
Fix Plasma tray watcher registration timing and StartupWMClass for window matching
Fix Fedora clamd detection and status checks
Make folder opening, file dialogs, and app launching Flatpak-aware
Handle non-UTF-8 filenames and filter non-fatal LibClamAV errors during scans
Escape Pango markup in widget titles and clamp scan progress overflow
Defer panel data loading and share LogManager across views for faster startup
Restart ClamAV services after applying config changes and repair config duplication
Refresh cryptography, certifi, and pytest pins (pytest >=9.0.3 for CVE-2025-71176)

description.p: Security hardening, scanner reliability fixes, and release pipeline updates

ul.li: Fix daemon scanning behavior for EICAR detection, clamd streaming, and live progress scans
Harden privileged config saving and updater force-update paths against unsafe input
Handle non-UTF-8 scanner output safely and address static analysis findings
Fix tray profile selection navigation during scan startup flows
Refresh dependency pins including cryptography, requests, numpy, Pillow, and charset-normalizer
Add a dedicated dependency-audit workflow and update CI signing support for Node 24

description.p: Bug fixes, Flatpak hardening, and test coverage improvements

ul.li: Update ClamAV to 1.5.2 (security patch)
Read system config files across Flatpak sandbox boundary
Forward CLI args through local-run.sh to ClamUI
Fix i18n: add compat.py to POTFILES.in
Remove unnecessary org.a11y.Bus Flatpak permission
Upgrade GitHub Actions to Node.js 24 runtime
Add 236 tests for previously uncovered modules

description.p: CLI pipeline, security hardening, and broad compatibility improvements

ul.li: Full CLI subcommand pipeline: scan, status, history, quarantine, profile, and preferences
Security: fix CVE-2026-31899 (cairosvg), bump urllib3/numpy, add CodeQL and Dependabot
Privacy-safe scan logs that no longer persist file-identifying data
Ubuntu 22.04 / Pop!_OS compatibility for PyGObject < 3.50 and GLib 2.72
Dolphin (Plasma 6) file manager integration and Adwaita icon theme enforcement
Hardened preferences save flow, tray updates, and daemon exclusion handling
Dropped Python 3.10 — minimum is now Python 3.11

description.p: Internationalization, auto-scan on device mount, and multi-distro support

ul.li: Full internationalization support with German translation
Automatic scanning of USB drives and external devices on mount
Auto-detect ClamAV config paths for Fedora, RHEL, and other distros
Moved blocking subprocess calls to background threads for faster startup
Eliminated quarantine view first-switch lag with pre-initialized resources
Fixed file manager integration with tri-state detection and removal support
Improved test coverage from 69% to 71%
Live scan progress with real-time file display
Navigation sidebar and AppImage support
Debug logging and daemon log export
Flatpak and libadwaita 1.0 compatibility fixes
Security hardening and documentation overhaul
Fixed bugs related to Flatpak installation and execution
Improved Flatpak integration with host system
Enhanced Flatpak support for tray icon, keyring and notifications
Fixed bugs related to Ubuntu Desktop Xorg and Wayland not being able to maximize
Fixed bugs related to ClamAV configuration file permissions
Added back the Tray Icon
Fix screenshot URLs in AppStream metadata for Flathub compliance
File and directory scanning via ClamAV
Native GTK4/Adwaita user interface
Background scanning with responsive UI
Clear result display with status indicators
